title: Looking For An Ambient Sound From The Show
display_title: Looking For An Ambient Sound From The Show
wikitext:
[]: Looking For An Ambient Sound From The Show             Quote Post by Crystalline » Thu Jun 02, 2016 7:10 pm Episode 3, at around 02:57, when Shinji's doing the firing test thing, there's an ambient noise in the background. It's present in several other scenes throughout the series and it sounds really immersive. I'm a sucker for good ambient background :P I don't suppose there's any feasible way to get it somewhere, right?

[]: Re: Looking For An Ambient Sound From The Show             Quote Post by Crystalline » Mon Jul 11, 2016 12:31 pm Bump. Anyone?

[]: Re: Looking For An Ambient Sound From The Show             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Jul 17, 2016 3:19 pm I'm not sure if the isolated sound effect exists outside if whatever SFX library GAINAX and other studios had at their disposal at the time, and I'm not sure which libraries those would be.

[]: Re: Looking For An Ambient Sound From The Show             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 18, 2016 5:16 pm I wouldn't think the sound takes so long to loop that it would be a problem to just grab it during a quiet section of one of the scenes where it appears. It's just white noise, after all.
